summary: Age Gate Race Condition Fix VERIFIED. Under-18 users no longer see main peer support content - restriction screen displays correctly without any content flash.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Age Gate Race Condition Fix verified

seed_data_creation: Used AsyncStorage keys: @radio_check_dob='2010-01-15T00:00:00.000Z' and @radio_check_age_verified='true' to simulate under-18 user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Age Gate fix is working. The key insight is that AsyncStorage on web uses keys with '@' prefix (@radio_check_dob, @radio_check_age_verified) not radio_check_age_data. The fix at peer-support.tsx lines 30-31, 557-562, 564-662, and 665 correctly implements: 1) isLoading: isAgeLoading from useAgeGateContext, 2) Loading spinner when isAgeLoading, 3) Restriction screen when !isAgeLoading && isAgeVerified && isUnder18 && !canMakePeerCalls

details: Main content ('View Available Volunteers') NEVER visible to under-18 users
'Extra Protection Active' restriction screen displays immediately (at 50ms)
Alternative options shown: 'Chat with AI Battle Buddies', 'Contact Support Staff', 'Go Back'
No flash of main content at any time point (50ms, 200ms, 500ms, 2s)

rca_of_previous_issue.bug: Under-18 users briefly saw main peer support content before restriction
rca_of_previous_issue.root_cause: isLoading from useAgeGateContext was not being used in peer-support.tsx render conditions
rca_of_previous_issue.fix_applied: Lines 30-31: Added isLoading: isAgeLoading from context. Line 557-562: Show loading spinner when isAgeLoading. Line 564-665: Both restriction and main content conditions now check !isAgeLoading first
rca_of_previous_issue.verification: Tested with AsyncStorage containing under-18 DOB - restriction screen shows immediately without content flash
